textByHash.65c0a2f7c3b50d339a5f7fec20a20672edb0494c: No... I'm just a memory. A mere fragment of something far greater. A guardian of the knowledge that she left behind.
textByHash.927c60a01279638ac80e5c312982369afb412ee5: It is not my place to question why. I only exist to pass on that which she sealed away.
textByHash.21b1be50278f674325d89b440af47e722453da2e: The seals guard the truth. This seal has been broken, its knowledge is now open to all. Here is what you seek:
textByHash.ab97c47da85b971906301eed1e59c77ba05f5c0a: '...Therein lies my guilt. A part of me, trapped and alone. Dark, yes, but still a part of my being, sealed away in the Temple of Light.'
textByHash.6e38e70e0a592f2a18e34136667f9d9c71c1c1fa: 'The protections on the temple, they should keep her contained. But in case they don't, I created one last safeguard, a prison within a prison. With it I made a key, an orb of light, to unlock the darkness.'
textByHash.cc746af16454f1b68be38a6a5b920a6ead4713c7: 'I could have destroyed it, sealed her away forever. But I still question my decision, and so I hid the orb away, while I think upon my choices.'
textByHash.39deabb4f288a7aa02f5879d6548878807acabfc: 'The shrine at Gorlah, that is where it lies. With it, she can be freed... or destroyed...'
textByHash.8e0aefaea0563a4488655ef80c7f1150b0c3f988: And so ends the knowledge of this seal.
textByHash.1d24355c45117ab065c697c33f9a952598c0e68a: I have imparted the knowledge of this seal. There is nothing more here to give. If you seek the rest, then the other seals must be broken.
textByHash.ade1f77af877a774653cac3562b9fdca0ea57d06: Start with the Seal of Ithell, to the south east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.4ee69802370a1e58a718cedcc21defc9bd3cbe0f: The seeker of knowledge returns. Do you wish to hear the knowledge again?
textByHash.98a33743bd1010f57b304c28b95e5d6817dec5bf: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Ithell. You'll find it on the middle level, to the south east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.410f79ec301b707fadb7e98244b21f07d30d5a57: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Ithell. You'll find it on the middle level, to the south east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.7f10b8523356265e9190ab1653ebd5ee92e59451: 'When I first encountered the elves on their homeworld of Tarddiad, it was like I had finally found my purpose. I quickly fell in love with them, and they with me.'
textByHash.0437e9eb0f094498e230b849095c3dd5331c21a2: 'I set out to help them, to guide them. They immediately embraced this, and one of their mystics, Ceidwad, documented my teachings in a great book called the Cerddi.'
textByHash.62cc185b52fb794f4a16ff17de8c85aa0a739263: 'It was the start of something beautiful, but there is pain in beauty, as I soon came to realise...'
textByHash.20c80258a093da1c9ee2e1752348d9a57909a527: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Cadarn. You'll find it on the bottom level, to the south. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.e2f6ba95ffcd0c90f95c21e2a81392d73369d131: If you wish, I can return you to the central chamber.
textByHash.a78d85760408bc147784f30e5fd0c5d092769f22: Where would you like to go?
textByHash.51131ddd27db10db3007390d305785dd941a037c: I can only take you to a seal which has already been broken.
textByHash.85fb2ed1a29fa7e6823bbd581967c7b4de8c8739: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Cadarn. You'll find it on the bottom level, to the south. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.ac40ca783d3a17799d6f46c9757b6e2fecb7482c: '...Compared to many of the mortal races I had encountered, the elves had reasonable lifespans. And yet, it wasn't long enough.'
textByHash.79c0a88fd7296d561d95f2367150f093d3adb100: 'As I spent time with the elves, I watched as they withered and died. Each death was a blade through my heart, but none more so than Ceidwad, my closest companion.'
textByHash.2d6156fdeb19d4fb21677ecc4f6bb2c9b04fb2f2: 'It didn't seem fair, didn't seem right. They deserved more. I knew I had to give it to them...'
textByHash.0450689836d591bf1353d9286924171322b1832e: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Crwys. You'll find it on the middle level, to the north west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.42ce200b3c8a3b64ad50e9ec2fbb37663e5a827d: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Crwys. You'll find it on the middle level, to the north west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.b924708af683eb58ee11244236fece6c4abfb2a4: '...I found a way to share my essence with the elves, a piece of my being for each one of them.'
textByHash.ac54bad3d361e1c6599f5330b96f4ec7eb0fbd0a: 'With this gift, their years would number in the thousands, time enough to live the lives they deserved.'
textByHash.3b97e7e17d5b3f30ec2f2c2a3274f023e371bb54: 'In keeping with elven tradition, the gift was given through a song. They called it the song of creation, for it was the creation of a new life for them. At least, so we thought...'
textByHash.4112b9028783227d9d26ea155c5d020e18bf808b: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Amlodd. You'll find it on the bottom level, to the west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.7fb4606c8a0d18d03bdbff97e40b17f44feb8c4f: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Amlodd. You'll find it on the bottom level, to the west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.d2d094b43c0b848aaf6035dcc298c6463830c59d: '...With all my knowledge, I should have known not to meddle. That which I intended as a gift, soon turned out to be their curse.'
textByHash.7cad4c1bb4415f345429d4fd742ef93fd003d536: 'The song of creation increased their lifespans, but at a terrible price. It bound them to me. To stray too far from their sides, caused pain, and even death.'
textByHash.62198f1dfc0fce227bf2a708e3759f4610586ef3: 'I knew I had to help them, to fix my mistakes. I should have known that I'd only make it worse...'
textByHash.b6bbfcbdf4d8dd46055bd87a62eed50fc94e4830: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Meilyr. You'll find it on the top level, to the west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.2d12167d406656c5a4985bf6d93b4e085397f836: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Meilyr. You'll find it on the top level, to the west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.0252587dc12265a58510bb09534aab109c409606: '...Another being came to our world. Divine like myself, but not by design. He spoke of a perfect world, one filled with power.'
textByHash.848427de637d8c9aef76aa8b6af3fe466e1fb6ef: 'I knew it was a risk, but I decided to travel there. The power he spoke of might have been the only thing capable of saving the elves.'
textByHash.d6ebc030bb1ddd5d3679951b194a0e23654bb969: 'The curse made it impossible for me to go without them, so they had to come with me, and leave their home behind. It was hard on them, but in the end, I managed to convince them...'
textByHash.63dddfe71023d8e5134ecd7d43f10df10fc62fac: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Hefin. You'll find it on the top level, to the south west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.b03978b68e1ebaa6a4850dd12b85e8e68631bceb: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Hefin. You'll find it on the top level, to the south west. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.d867569445f28305c5b4a4b444851d355ea5d1bb: '...We made our home in the new world, in a great city of crystal spires. It was as beautiful as the world from which we came. But beneath that beauty, the curse remained.'
textByHash.59e7cca51e648b3e17feb0de862043ec90b790a4: 'The power that filled the world was even greater than I had anticipated. A higher power, one I had not encountered for a long time.'
textByHash.7915eaf73e79c7819f22fa3636c1f9e966545d99: 'I was sure this world held the key to breaking the curse, I just needed to find it...'
textByHash.8307e01ed303a530f8718eaab17cc3794f1b9d78: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Trahaearn. You'll find it on the top level, to the east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.690467f6bbf0c453c726abc72d7e6acf31c91c5b: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Trahaearn. You'll find it on the top level, to the east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.6b739caea4379a853b30e9b002693062e9d453ad: '...It took millennia, but I finally made a breakthrough. Deep beneath the mountains near our home, I found a source of deathly energy.'
textByHash.d1f7059a602996ab475c3fdfd1c806f8efd576b6: 'I was sure I could use this power to save them. My essence is of life, of light. This darkness would be the perfect counter, a way to nullify the curse.'
textByHash.0b9666cd99b8b0592623e294a86a4193f0c3f7d5: 'I should have known not to be so foolish. This curse started with my meddling, my meddling was never going to end it...'
textByHash.83c4bfab3dd589c2062867b67ffb3bde7f8f0493: If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Iorwerth. You'll find it on the middle level, to the north east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.6d77042e6ed80729b0b50d74d8db3f9d40775472: Then I have nothing more to give. If you seek more of the knowledge, look to the Seal of Iorwerth. You'll find it on the middle level, to the north east. The light will guide the way...
textByHash.dbd7b79a926fa27819dea4edae30454be2783873: '...I am a being of light, but even within me, there was some darkness. I poured this darkness into my creation, combining it with the deathly energy I had found.'
textByHash.d11943f7448fd5629d5eb16fb477ff0ca0d87527: 'When I was done, I looked upon my creation. A fragment of myself, but one of darkness, rather than light. I thought her essence would counter my own, ending the curse with her mere existence.'
textByHash.68b281e5d40e7d60c242bdf6cc5c8a6909b4bff7: 'It was not to be though. The curse was tied to me, not to her. I had failed, and she knew it. She turned on me, tried to destroy me. I had to stop her, so I sealed her away, in the very place I had created her...'
textByHash.922807e6c85e2d455460e4f6492c0f7c3563771a: Then I have nothing more to give. If you wish to hear a different piece of knowledge, look to the other seals. The light will guide the way...
